creator: shawkris@hotmail.com
text:
Sorry, the server isn't used with FreeBSD anymore so I can't really troubleshoot this any futher. The EEPROM corruption was also detected in Linux. I actually replaced the system add-in board in the server (daughterboard with SCSI, VGA and LAN) and that was corrupted too after booting FreeBSD.
